notices.title: Admissions Open for Academic Year 2026-27
notices.excerpt: Online applications are now being accepted for LKG through Class 11. Limited seats available in select classes.
notices.body:
Dear Parents and Students,

We are pleased to announce that Virat Public School is now accepting applications for admission to the academic year 2026-27, across classes from LKG to Class 11 (Science, Commerce, and Arts streams).

Available seats

  • LKG — 60 seats
  • UKG — 40 seats
  • Class 1 to 8 — limited seats in select classes
  • Class 9 — 30 seats
  • Class 11 (Science) — 40 seats
  • Class 11 (Commerce) — 30 seats
  • Class 11 (Arts) — 20 seats

How to apply

  1. Visit the Admissions page on our website.
  2. Fill out the inquiry form with accurate details.
  3. Our office will contact you within one working day.
  4. Visit the campus with your child for a friendly interaction.
  5. Submit documents and complete fee payment to confirm admission.

Age criteria

As per RBSE norms, the minimum age as on 31 March 2026:

  • LKG — 3 years 6 months
  • UKG — 4 years 6 months
  • Class 1 — 5 years 6 months

Important dates

  • Application window: 15 July 2026 – 15 August 2026
  • Campus interactions: From 20 July 2026 onwards
  • Admission confirmation deadline: 30 August 2026
  • Session commences: 1 April 2027

For any queries, please call the school office at +91 90000 00000 between 9:00 AM and 4:00 PM, Monday to Saturday.

We look forward to welcoming your family to the Virat Public School community.

Warm regards,
Office of the Principal
Virat Public School, Kotputli

notices.title: Mid-Term Examination Timetable Released
notices.excerpt: Class-wise mid-term schedule for July–August 2026. Exams commence from 21 July 2026.
notices.body:
Class-wise mid-term schedule for July–August 2026 has been released. Exams commence from 21 July 2026.

Detailed date sheet is attached. Students are requested to collect their admit cards from the class teacher at least 3 days before their first exam.

Schedule at a glance

  • 21 July (Mon) — Hindi
  • 22 July (Tue) — English
  • 23 July (Wed) — Mathematics
  • 24 July (Thu) — Science
  • 25 July (Fri) — Social Science
  • 28 July (Mon) — Sanskrit / Third Language

Reporting time: 8:00 AM. Exam time: 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM.

notices.title: Parent-Teacher Meeting on 20 July 2026
notices.excerpt: All parents are requested to attend the PTM between 9:00 AM and 1:00 PM. Kindly collect your ward's progress card.
notices.body:
Dear Parents,

You are cordially invited to the Parent-Teacher Meeting scheduled for 20 July 2026 (Monday) between 9:00 AM and 1:00 PM.

The PTM is an opportunity to:

  • Collect your ward's mid-term progress card
  • Discuss your child's learning progress with the class teacher
  • Understand the homework and revision plan for the remainder of the term
  • Address any specific concerns you may have

Venue: Respective classrooms (please check the notice board for class assignments)

What to bring: Your parent ID card (issued at the time of admission). If you have misplaced it, please request a temporary pass from the school office at least one day in advance.

Parking: Please use the designated visitor parking area near the main gate. Two-wheeler parking is available inside the campus for a token fee of ₹5.

We look forward to seeing you on 20 July.

Warm regards,
Office of the Principal

notices.title: New Transport Route Added — Srimadhopur Road
notices.excerpt: Effective 1 July 2026, the school transport fleet will add a new route covering Srimadhopur Road.
notices.body:
Effective 1 July 2026, the school transport fleet will add a new route covering Srimadhopur Road.

Stops on the new route include:

  • Virat Nagar (school gate) — 7:30 AM pickup
  • Kotputli Bus Stand — 7:50 AM
  • Behror Mod — 8:10 AM
  • Srimadhopur Crossing — 8:25 AM
  • Various village stops along Srimadhopur Road

Return drop-off in the afternoon follows the reverse order, departing the school at 3:30 PM.

Transport fee: ₹8,400 per annum (payable in four quarterly installments).

Parents interested in availing transport on this route may contact the school office or fill out the inquiry form on the Admissions page.

notices.title: Summer Camp Registrations Open
notices.excerpt: Registrations for the annual summer camp are now open. Limited seats.
notices.body:
Registrations for the annual summer camp (1–15 July 2026) are now open. The camp runs weekdays from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM.

Activities

  • Art & craft
  • Sports (football, kho-kho, athletics)
  • Yoga & meditation
  • Basic computer skills
  • Storytelling & creative writing

Fee

₹3,500 for two weeks (includes snacks and materials).

Register at the school office. Limited seats — first come, first served.

notices.title: Class 10 Board Exam Form — Last Date 25 June
notices.excerpt: Class 10 students: the last date to submit RBSE board exam forms is 25 June 2026.
notices.body:
Class 10 students are reminded that the last date to submit RBSE Class 10 board exam forms with the school office is 25 June 2026. Late submissions will not be accepted under any circumstances.

Documents required at the time of submission:

  • Aadhaar card (photocopy)
  • 2 recent passport-size photographs
  • School fee receipt for May and June 2026

Please collect the form from the school office, fill in the required details, and return it for verification by the principal before final submission.

notices.title: Summer Vacation 2026: 1 June – 30 June
notices.excerpt: The school will remain closed for summer vacation from 1 June to 30 June 2026.
notices.body:
The school will remain closed for summer vacation from 1 June to 30 June 2026.

The office will be open from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM on weekdays for admission inquiries and fee payments during this period.

Vacation homework and assignment sheets are available on the school notice board. Students are encouraged to complete the assignments before the new session begins on 1 July 2026.

notices.title: Independence Day Celebration
notices.excerpt: Join us for the 78th Independence Day celebration at the school.
notices.body:
You are cordially invited to the school's Independence Day celebration on 15 August 2025 at 8:00 AM.

The programme includes flag hoisting by the principal, cultural performances by students from various classes, and a special address by the chief guest.

Parents and community members are welcome to attend.
